title: Bellevue Superior Hotel Transfers Šibenik | Fixed Prices | TAXI Antonio
description: Private transfers to and from the Bellevue Superior Hotel in Šibenik. Fixed prices booked in advance: Split Airport €95, Zadar Airport €130, Krka from €45. Door-to-door, one local driver.
keywords: bellevue sibenik transfers, bellevue superior hotel transfer, bellevue sibenik taxi, bellevue airport transfer, taxi bellevue sibenik

schema.serviceType: Hotel airport and city taxi transfers
schema.name: Bellevue Superior Hotel Šibenik Transfers
schema.description: Private, fixed-price taxi transfers to and from the Bellevue Superior Hotel in the heart of Šibenik. Airport transfers, city-to-city transfers and Krka day trips, booked in advance at a price agreed upfront.

hasOfferCatalog.name: Fixed transfer prices from the Bellevue Superior Hotel

mainEntity.name: How much is a taxi from the Bellevue Superior Hotel to Split Airport?

acceptedAnswer.text: A private transfer from the Bellevue Superior Hotel to Split Airport is a fixed 95 euros per car for up to 4 passengers, booked in advance. Tolls, fuel and luggage are included, and the price is the same in both directions.

mainEntity.name: Where do you pick up at the Bellevue Superior Hotel?

acceptedAnswer.text: Right in front of the hotel. The Bellevue is in the heart of Šibenik, and I confirm the exact pickup spot when you book so you are not waiting at the kerb.

mainEntity.name: Should I book my Bellevue transfer in advance?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. All the prices listed are fixed prices for transfers booked in advance. Booking ahead guarantees the car, the pickup time and the price, which matters most for early flights and high season.

mainEntity.name: Do you meet arriving guests at the airport?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. For arrivals I monitor your flight in real time, wait in the arrivals hall with a name sign, and drive you straight to the Bellevue. Waiting for delayed flights is free.

mainEntity.name: Can you take us from the Bellevue to Krka National Park?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. A one-way transfer to the Krka Lozovac entrance is 45 euros and to the Skradin entrance 50 euros. I also offer a full private day trip with waiting time included, with pickup at the hotel.

mainEntity.name: How do I pay for the transfer?

acceptedAnswer.text: A 20% advance payment (minimum 20 euros) confirms the booking, by bank transfer or card. The balance is paid to the driver on the day, in cash or by card.
